# Regression: stalls missing around a hole and in the face to its left.
# The face surrounding the hole should have stalls along its aisle-facing
# edges, and the face whose top-left corner touches the hole should still
# have stalls on the top half.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(750,0)
(750,500)
(0,500)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(750,500), area 375000

polygon hole
(275.43,152.80)
(475,150)
(375,350)
----
polygon hole 3 vertices, ccw, bbox (275.430,150)-(475,350), area 19817.000

generate
----
total_stalls: 534
faces: 43 (boundary: 2, interior: 41)
graph: 66 vertices, 104 edges (perimeter: 43, interior: 61)
regions: 1
